# KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Cutoff, Placement, Ranking
## KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology Placements 2026
KPRIET provides on-campus, off-campus, and internship opportunities to all its students through its placement cell. The college has a strong placement record with top recruiters from various industries. As per the KPRIET Placement report 2024, a total of 445 students were placed in top-notch companies. KPRIET placement statistics for 2024 are as follows:

| Particulars | Placement Statistics 2024 |
| --- | --- |

| Placement Rate | 94% |
| Highest Package | INR 54 LPA |
| Average Package | INR 5 LPA |
| Median Package | INR 4 LPA |
| No. of Offers | 650 |
| No. of Students Placed | 445 |
| No. of Companies Visited | 50 |

Top recruiters for graduates from KPRIET are given below:

| Zoho | TCS | Cognizant |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Wipro | Infosys | HCL |
| IBM | Caterpillar | Genpact |

KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology B.E./B.Tech TNEA cutoff 2025 will be released soon. KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology cutoff 2025 for B.E./B.Tech will be released on the official website of TNEA (tneaonline.org). KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology, Coimbatore or KPRIET Coimbatore placements related activities are managed and controlled by the Career Development Centre which is a fully established training and placement cell of the KPRIET college. It provides career guidance and placement assistance to the graduating students by offering them skill development programmes prior to KPRIET placements drives such as communication skills, personality development, quantitative aptitude, logical reasoning, verbal reasoning, and more. According to the data provided by KPRIET Coimbatore, approximately 455 students were placed and Rs 54,00,000 lakhs per annum was the KPRIET highest salary package offered during the KPRIET placements drives 2023
